name: Apple Music Metadata Agent
author: Navidrome Team
description: Fetches artist metadata from Apple Music using free iTunes/Apple Music endpoints

cache_ttl_days.title: Cache TTL (days)
cache_ttl_days.description: How long to cache scraped metadata before re-fetching

countries.title: Countries
countries.description: Comma-separated list of two-letter ISO country codes for Apple Music storefronts, tried in order until content is found. Controls the language of artist biographies (e.g., 'br' returns Portuguese, 'de' returns German).

http.reason: Fetch artist metadata from iTunes API and Apple Music web pages

kvstore.reason: Cache artist ID mappings and scraped metadata to reduce API calls
